title: Sterling EHS095 95mm Hasp and Staple , Grey
description: From the manufacturer Hasp & Staples suitable for any project Whatever your security needs and budget, you can get a hasp and staple that is durable and meets your requirements. General Security zinc plated Hasp & Staple Corrosion resistant Hardened steel staple Concealed fixings Screws supplied Available in five different sizes Mid Security Hasp & Staples Corrosion resistant zinc plating Hardened steel staple (80mm and above) Hardened steel hinge pins and link Concealed hinge pins and fixings Screws supplied or screws and bolts supplied (depending on size) Tough steel construction Links for use around corners and angles (160mm only - CHS160) Available in four different sizes Hasp & Staples for heavier applciations Corrosion resistant zinc plating Hardened steel hinge pins, links and staple Concealed hinge pins Screws and coach bolts supplied Tough steel construction Concealed fixings links for use around corners and angles Available in three different sizes Black Mid Security Hasp & Staple Corrosion resistant black zinc plating Hardened steel staple Concealed hinge pin and fixings Screws supplied 120mm We have Hasp & Staples for all kinds of uses, if none of the above are suitable for you, what about one from the following ranges Heavy Security for use with Disc Padlocks Corrosion resistant Tough steel construction Concealed hinge pin and fixings Hardened steel hinge pin, link and staple Links for use around corners and angles (190mm only - BHS190) High tensile bolts, screws and fixing plates supplied For use with round shackleless padlock Hardened steel hasp & staple Corrosion resistant Tough steel construction Screws supplied For use with round shackless padlock (SSP173) Solution packs - Hasp & staples with padlocks Solutions packs designed to match padlock with appropriate hasp & staple Available in three different sizes Disc padlock pack available Van Lock - Shackleless padlock with Hasp Bright nickel plated and electrophoretic deposition (EPD) treated for improved corrosion protection Round shackleless steel padlock (SSP173) Sterling Security Ratings 9½ - Heavy applications Heavy duty hasp & padlock Sterling Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter one of the largest manufactures of security products in the world. Burg-Wächter has a proud heritage of over 120 years and are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Burg-Wächter UK Being a family business and one of the leading international producer we pass experience and knowledge on from generation to generation. Thorugh this know-how the Burg-Wachter brand is trusted throughout the world. Our eight product groups make life safe and more secure.
